text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pawel
Date: Tue Feb 10 21:05:39 UTC 2015
New revision: 378800
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/378800

Log:
  - Update to version 1.7, project now hosted on Github [1]
  - Clean pkg-plist [1]
  - Unmute install command, don't install hidden files
  - Project developers changed license to MIT:
    https://github.com/YOURLS/YOURLS/issues/1528
  - Also tarball now contains Requests sources under
    ISC license (%%WWWDIR%%%/includes/Requests)

  PR:		196941 [1]
  Submitted by:	Chip Marshall <chip@2bithacker.net> [1]

Changes:
  head/www/yourls/Makefile
  head/www/yourls/distinfo
  head/www/yourls/pkg-plist
